clean_story:
Now I will teach you Now.

Now is the sharp edge of stick when it cuts—not before, not after. Now is fire burning your hand this breath, not smoke left behind or wood not yet lit. Now is hunger in belly before berry touches tongue—then berry is Now. Now is shadow of sun-stick shortest, not long before or long after. Now is rock hitting foot—pain there, not memory of pain or fear of next pain. Look: Now is breath in, breath out—only that, nothing else Now.
